member.name: M:Presentation.Controllers.AuthenticationController.AdminRegisterUser(Shared.DataTransferObjects.UserForRegistrationAdminDto)
member.summary: Allows an authenticated admin to create a new user and assign a role to that user via the admin registration endpoint (`POST api/authentication/admin/register`).
member.param: Registration payload provided by an authenticated admin. Roles included in the payload will be assigned to the created user.
member.returns: 201 Created with when successful; otherwise an error response.
member.response: User created successfully and roles assigned.
The request is invalid or registration failed validation.
The caller is authenticated but not in the Admin role.

member.name: M:Presentation.Controllers.AuthenticationController.RegisterUser(Shared.DataTransferObjects.UserForRegistrationDto)
member.summary: Registers a new user, assigns the Customer role implicitly, and returns user details with JWT tokens.
member.param: User details for registration (email, password, etc.). Role is assigned implicitly and is not accepted from the request payload.
member.returns: 201 Created with user details and token on success; 400 Bad Request with model errors on failure.

member.name: M:Presentation.Controllers.AuthenticationController.Authenticate(Shared.DataTransferObjects.UserForAuthenticationDto)
member.summary: Authenticates a user and returns a JWT token when credentials are valid.
member.param: Credentials for authentication (username/email and password).
member.returns: 200 OK with token DTO on success; 401 Unauthorized on failure.

member.name: M:Presentation.Controllers.CartsController.GetCartForUser
member.summary: Gets the cart for the authenticated user.
member.returns: The cart if successful, Unauthorized if user ID not found in claims

member.name: M:Presentation.Controllers.CartsController.AddCartItemToCart(Shared.DataTransferObjects.AddToCartDto)
member.summary: Adds a product to user's cart
member.response: If the user is not authorized

member.name: M:Presentation.Controllers.CartsController.UpdateCartItemForCart(Shared.DataTransferObjects.UpdateCartItemDto)
member.summary: Updates a product in user's cart
member.returns: Returns the updated cart
member.response: If the user is not authorized

member.name: M:Presentation.Controllers.CartsController.DeleteCartItemFromCart(System.Guid)
member.summary: Deletes a product from user's cart
member.response: If the user is not authorized

member.name: M:Presentation.Controllers.CartsController.IncreaseCartItemQuantity(System.Guid)
member.summary: Increases the quantity of a product in user's cart
member.returns: Returns the updated cart

member.name: M:Presentation.Controllers.CartsController.DecreaseCartItemQuantity(System.Guid)
member.summary: Decreases the quantity of a product in user's cart
member.returns: Returns the updated cart

member.name: M:Presentation.Controllers.CartsController.ClearCartForUser
member.summary: Clears the cart for the authenticated user.
member.returns: No content if successful, Unauthorized if user ID not found in claims

member.name: M:Presentation.Controllers.CartsController.DeleteCartForUser
member.summary: Deletes the cart for the authenticated user.
member.returns: No content if successful, Unauthorized if user ID not found in claims

member.name: M:Presentation.Controllers.CategoriesController.GetCategories(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Gets the list of all Product Categories
member.returns: The product categories list

member.name: M:Presentation.Controllers.CategoriesController.GetCategory(System.Guid)
member.summary: Get a single category by its Id
member.param: Id
member.returns: A single category by Id

member.name: M:Presentation.Controllers.CategoriesController.CreateCategory(Shared.DataTransferObjects.CategoryForCreationDto)
member.summary: Creates a newly created category
member.returns: A newly created category

member.name: M:Presentation.Controllers.CategoriesController.GetCategoryCollection(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Guid})
member.summary: Gets a collection of categories by their Ids
member.param: Collection of category Ids
member.returns: A collection of categories matching the provided Ids

member.name: M:Presentation.Controllers.CategoriesController.CreateCategoryCollection(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Shared.DataTransferObjects.CategoryForCreationDto})
member.summary: Creates a collection of categories.
member.param: The categories to create.
member.returns: A containing the created categories.

member.name: M:Presentation.Controllers.CategoriesController.DeleteCategory(System.Guid)
member.summary: Deletes a category by its Id.
member.param: The category Id.
member.returns: A \`204 No Content\` response when deletion succeeds.

member.name: M:Presentation.Controllers.CategoriesController.UpdateCategory(System.Guid,Shared.DataTransferObjects.CategoryForUpdateDto)
member.summary: Updates a category by its Id.
member.param: The category Id.
The category data to update.
member.returns: A `204 No Content` response when the update succeeds.

member.name: M:Presentation.Controllers.ProductsController.GetProductsForCategory(System.Guid,Shared.RequestFeatures.ProductParameters)
member.summary: Retrieves all products for the specified category. Use the pageNumber and pageSize query string parameters to control paging, minPrice and maxPrice to filter by price range, and searchTerm to search products by name or description.
member.param: The unique identifier of the category.
The query parameters used for paging, price range filtering, and search.
member.returns: An containing the paged list of products for the specified category.

member.name: M:Presentation.Controllers.ProductsController.GetProductForCategory(System.Guid,System.Guid)
member.summary: Retrieves a single product by its identifier for the specified category.
member.param: The unique identifier of the category that contains the product.
The unique identifier of the product to retrieve.
member.returns: An containing the requested product DTO when found.

member.name: M:Presentation.Controllers.ProductsController.CreateProductForCategory(System.Guid,Shared.DataTransferObjects.ProductForCreationDto,Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.IFormFile)
member.summary: Creates a new product in the specified category.
member.param: The unique identifier of the category to create the product in.
DTO containing the product data to create.
member.returns: An that returns 201 Created with the created product DTO.

member.name: M:Presentation.Controllers.ProductsController.DeleteProductForCategory(System.Guid,System.Guid)
member.summary: Deletes the specified product from the given category.
member.param: The unique identifier of the category that contains the product.
The unique identifier of the product to delete.
member.returns: An that returns 204 NoContent on success or 404 NotFound if not found.

member.name: M:Presentation.Controllers.ProductsController.UpdateProductForCategory(System.Guid,System.Guid,Shared.DataTransferObjects.ProductForUpdateDto)
member.summary: Partially updates a product for the specified category using a JSON Patch document.
member.param: The unique identifier of the category that contains the product.
The unique identifier of the product to update.
A JSON Patch document describing the partial updates.
member.returns: An that returns 204 NoContent on success, 400 BadRequest for invalid input, or 422 UnprocessableEntity for model validation errors.

member.name: M:Presentation.Controllers.ProductsController.PartiallyUpdateProductForCategory(System.Guid,System.Guid,Microsoft.AspNetCore.JsonPatch.JsonPatchDocument{Shared.DataTransferObjects.ProductForUpdateDto})
member.summary: Partially updates a product for the specified category using a JSON Patch document. Applies the patch to a ProductForUpdateDto and persists changes if valid.
member.param: The unique identifier of the category that contains the product.
The unique identifier of the product to patch.
A describing the partial updates.
member.returns: An that returns 204 NoContent on success, 400 BadRequest for invalid input, or 422 UnprocessableEntity for model validation errors.

member.name: M:Presentation.Controllers.ReviewsController.GetReviewsForProduct(System.Guid)
member.summary: Retrieves all reviews for the specified product.
member.param: The unique identifier of the product.
member.returns: An containing the list of reviews for the specified product.

member.name: M:Presentation.Controllers.ReviewsController.CreateReviewForProduct(System.Guid,Shared.DataTransferObjects.ReviewForCreationDto)
member.summary: Creates a new review for the specified product.
member.param: The unique identifier of the product.
The review to create.
member.returns: An containing the created review.

member.name: M:Presentation.Controllers.ReviewsController.GetAverageRatingForProduct(System.Guid)
member.summary: Retrieves the average rating for the specified product.
member.param: The unique identifier of the product.
member.returns: An containing the average rating for the specified product.

member.name: M:Presentation.Controllers.ReviewsController.DeleteReviewForProduct(System.Guid)
member.summary: Deletes the specified review for the specified product.
member.param: The unique identifier of the review.
member.returns: An indicating whether the deletion was successful.

member.name: M:Presentation.Controllers.TokenController.Refresh(Shared.DataTransferObjects.TokenDto)
member.summary: Refreshes an authentication token using the provided refresh token.
member.param: Contains the access and refresh tokens used to obtain a new token pair.
member.returns: ActionResult with the refreshed TokenDto on success or an error response.

member.name: M:Presentation.Controllers.TokenController.Logout(Shared.DataTransferObjects.TokenDto)
member.summary: Logs out the current session by revoking the stored refresh token.
member.param: Contains the access and refresh tokens to identify the session.
member.returns: 204 No Content when logout succeeds.
